heading: Cooperation with public and private agencies, organizations, and individuals; acceptance of contributions and gifts
label: 471h Cooperation with public and private agencies, organizations, and individuals; acceptance of contributions and gifts
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is hereby authorized to cooperate with and receive the cooperation of public and private agencies and organizations and individuals in the development, administration, and operation of the Cradle of Forestry in America. The Secretary of Agriculture is authorized to accept contributions and gifts to be used to further the purposes of sections 471f to 471h of this title.
